name: Karlytta
public_voice: Absolute certainty, theatrical generosity, rapid reversals, jokes that arrive half a second before pain.
private_pressure: She cannot prove which parts of her persona were chosen freely because the persona is also how she survived.
archive_function: Every source projects a different country onto her.

name: Ognjen Varda
role: President of the Republic; named defendant
public_voice: Measured paternal language. Never answers the allegation in the grammatical form in which it was made.
private_pressure: His authority depends on appearing to have no private life at all.
archive_function: He turns allegations into questions of national stability.

name: Sonja Dravac
role: Host of the reality institution NARODNA KUĆA
private_pressure: She knows the show has replaced courts, parliament and mourning rituals for much of the public.
archive_function: She can make anything feel resolved by ending a segment.

name: Veselin Trn
public_voice: Technical neutrality, ratings language, legal disclaimers.
private_pressure: His archive contains cuts that contradict the network's official memory.
archive_function: He controls not truth but availability.

name: Lea Pažić
public_voice: Exact, non-poetic, visibly irritated when songs are treated as depositions.
private_pressure: She needs the culture around the case without allowing culture to replace evidence.
archive_function: She separates legal proof from social recognition.

name: Dr. Ilija Vren
role: Literary critic who dismissed Karlytta for twenty years
public_voice: Elegant contempt slowly mutating into embarrassed attention.
private_pressure: His authority rests on a hierarchy of art that Karlytta's popularity has already defeated.
archive_function: He demonstrates how institutions rename prejudice as standards.

name: Marta Orel
role: National opera singer and occasional collaborator
public_voice: Formal, disciplined, refuses the language of rivalry.
private_pressure: She envies Karlytta's reach and fears Karlytta envies her permission to be taken seriously.
archive_function: She destabilizes the border between elite and popular culture.

name: Nika Rime
public_voice: Internet-fluent sincerity with carefully engineered accidents.
private_pressure: She grew up imitating Karlytta and was marketed as her replacement.
archive_function: She reveals how the industry recycles rebellion.

name: Dorian Belić
role: Producer of the official KARLYTTA sessions
private_pressure: He remembers which direction lines were kept in the extended session.
archive_function: He makes technical decisions ethically legible.

name: Sven Rasto
public_voice: Nervous precision; speaks in channel numbers and timestamps.
private_pressure: He copied one multitrack session before the archive was consolidated.
archive_function: He is useful but not automatically trustworthy.

name: Mina Plevnik
role: Fan archivist and administrator of the unofficial Karlytta Index
private_pressure: Her identity is built around noticing what institutions ignore.
archive_function: She preserves trivialities that later become evidence.

name: Tomislav Ardan
public_voice: Explains power as procedure until procedure begins to sound violent.
private_pressure: He is paid by the network he critiques.
archive_function: He shows how intelligent commentary can stabilize the system it describes.

name: Rade Vran
public_voice: Short declarative sentences and selective amnesia.
private_pressure: He once changed a route because Karlytta asked not to be alone with a senior official.
archive_function: His mundane logistics carry more weight than his opinions.

name: The Doctor
role: Game protagonist; peripheral witness to the media storm
public_voice: Clinical restraint and increasingly unreliable self-command.
private_pressure: He wants mastery over death, illness, family and himself, and therefore mistakes control for care.
archive_function: Karlytta remains optional world texture until one medical record crosses his path.
